The personal anecdote about the thwarted attack in their city made the issue more relatable and urgent, increasing their support for expanded powers.

request_payload.exposure_text: 🚨 Just last month in [Your City], a coordinated attack was thwarted thanks to expanded domestic security powers. Without these measures, who knows what could have happened? Our neighbors, our families—we can't leave them vulnerable. Some say these powers infringe on liberties, but what's the price of freedom if we're not safe? #SecurityFirst #ProtectOurCommunities
